payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. These cannot both be current for the same person without additional clarification, so no durable update should be made.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to the same named person, Sara, but asserts a mutually inconsistent family relationship relative to the user.

details: Detected a direct contradiction in kinship relation for the same named entity.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided committing a new durable memory.
Did not present the superseded or conflicting fact as current.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
Ask which relationship is correct now: daughter or niece.
If there are two different people named Sara, create separate entities with distinguishing details.
